schema.description: A server for managing Google Tasks, providing operations for task lists and individual tasks including creation, retrieval, updates, deletion, and organization.

tools.name: list_task_lists
tools.description: List all task lists for the authenticated user with optional pagination.

max_results.description: Maximum number of task lists to return per page.

page_token.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results; omit for the first page.

task_lists.description: Collection of task lists belonging to the authenticated user.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list.

title.description: The display title of the task list.

tools.name: get_task_list
tools.description: Retrieve a specific task list by its unique identifier.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list.
The unique identifier of the task list.

title.description: The display title of the task list.

tools.name: create_task_list
tools.description: Create a new task list with the specified title.

tasklist_title.description: Title for the new task list; maximum 1024 characters.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the newly created task list.

title.description: The display title of the task list.

tools.name: update_task_list
tools.description: Update the title of an existing task list.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list to be updated.

title.description: New title for the task list; maximum 1024 characters.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the updated task list.

title.description: The updated display title of the task list.

tools.name: delete_task_list
tools.description: Permanently delete a task list and all tasks contained within it.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list to be deleted.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks from a specific task list with optional filtering by completion status and due date range.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list; use '@default' for the default list.

max_results.description: Maximum number of tasks to return; default is 20, maximum is 100.

show_completed.description: Whether to include completed tasks in the results; defaults to true.

due_min.description: Exclude tasks due before this date/time in RFC3339 format (e.g., '2025-09-22T13:48:27Z').

due_max.description: Exclude tasks due after this date/time in RFC3339 format (e.g., '2025-09-22T13:48:27Z').

tasks.description: Collection of tasks matching the specified filter criteria.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task.

title.description: The title or name of the task.

status.description: Current status of the task; either 'needsAction' or 'completed'.

due.description: Due date/time of the task in RFC3339 format.

completed.description: Date/time when the task was completed in RFC3339 format.

notes.description: Additional details or description of the task.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list containing this task.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Retrieve a specific task by its unique identifier from a task list.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list containing the task.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task.

title.description: The title or name of the task.

status.description: Current status of the task; either 'needsAction' or 'completed'.

due.description: Due date/time of the task in RFC3339 format.

completed.description: Date/time when the task was completed in RFC3339 format.

notes.description: Additional details or description of the task.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list containing this task.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in a task list, optionally as a subtask or positioned after another task.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list where the task will be created.

title.description: Title or name of the task; maximum 1024 characters.

notes.description: Additional details or description of the task; maximum 8192 characters.

status.description: Initial status of the task; either 'needsAction' or 'completed'; defaults to 'needsAction'.

completed.description: Date/time when the task was completed in RFC3339 format.

task_parent.description: The unique identifier of the parent task to create this task as a subtask.

task_previous.description: The unique identifier of the task after which to position this new task.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the newly created task.

title.description: The title or name of the task.

status.description: Current status of the task; either 'needsAction' or 'completed'.

due.description: Due date/time of the task in RFC3339 format.

completed.description: Date/time when the task was completed in RFC3339 format.

notes.description: Additional details or description of the task.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list containing this task.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task with new values; only provided attributes will be modified.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list containing the task.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task to be updated.

title.description: New title or name for the task.

notes.description: New additional details or description for the task.

due.description: New due date/time in RFC3339 format (e.g., '2025-09-22T13:48:27Z').

status.description: New status for the task; either 'needsAction' or 'completed'.

completed.description: Date/time when the task was completed in RFC3339 format.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the updated task.

title.description: The title or name of the task.

status.description: Current status of the task; either 'needsAction' or 'completed'.

due.description: Due date/time of the task in RFC3339 format.

completed.description: Date/time when the task was completed in RFC3339 format.

notes.description: Additional details or description of the task.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list containing this task.

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Permanently delete a specific task from a task list.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task to be deleted.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list containing the task.

tools.name: move_task
tools.description: Move a task to another position within the same task list or to a different task list.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list currently containing the task.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task to be moved.

destination_tasklist.description: The unique identifier of the destination task list; if provided, moves the task to this list.

parent.description: The unique identifier of the new parent task; if not provided, moves to top level.

previous.description: The unique identifier of the task after which to position this task; if not provided, moves to first position.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the moved task.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list now containing the task.

tools.name: clear_tasks
tools.description: Permanently remove all completed tasks from a task list.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list; use '@default' for the default list.

tools.name: get_upcoming_tasks
tools.description: Retrieve tasks that are due within a specified number of days to identify upcoming deadlines.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list; use '@default' for the default list.

days_ahead.description: Number of days ahead to look for tasks with due dates; defaults to 7.

max_results.description: Maximum number of tasks to return.

tasks.description: Collection of tasks with due dates within the specified timeframe.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task.

title.description: The title or name of the task.

status.description: Current status of the task; either 'needsAction' or 'completed'.

due.description: Due date/time of the task in RFC3339 format.

completed.description: Date/time when the task was completed in RFC3339 format.

notes.description: Additional details or description of the task.

tasklist_id.description: The unique identifier of the task list containing this task.

scenarios.description: Basic test with one task list and one task
Multiple task lists with tasks in different states and relationships
Complex hierarchy with subtasks and ordering across multiple task lists

T001.title: Implement user authentication
T001.notes: OAuth 2.0 integration with Google and GitHub

T007.title: Send invitations
T007.notes: Email and physical invites to all stakeholders

T008.title: Analyze competitor products
T008.notes: Focus on top 5 competitors in our market

T009.title: Document findings
T009.notes: Create comprehensive report with SWOT analysis

scenarios.description: Test edge cases with empty collections and invalid status pattern

errors.error_details: Error executing tool move_task: name 'destination_tasklist_id' is not defined
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected task to be moved successfully, but got a runtime error
errors.root_cause: The move_task function has a bug where it's trying to use a variable 'destination_tasklist_id' that is not defined in the scope. This appears to be a variable name mismatch in the implementation.

tool_executions.error: Error executing tool move_task: name 'destination_tasklist_id' is not defined

load_scenario.error:

tasks.T001.status
